original_abstract: This recommendation proposes a definition for the term “halogen bond”, which designates a specific subset of the inter- and intramolecular interactions involving a halogen atom in a molecular entity.
humanized_abstract: In this recommendation we propose a definition for the term “halogen bond”, which refers to a particular class of inter- and intramolecular interactions in which a halogen atom in one molecular entity acts towards another molecular entity.

document.output: In this recommendation we propose a definition for the term “halogen bond”, which refers to a particular class of inter- and intramolecular interactions in which a halogen atom in one molecular entity acts towards another molecular entity.
